label: Safety policies, constitutional constraints & alignment

node.label: Safety policies, constitutional constraints & alignment
node.definition: Safety and policy alignment shape behavior with written principles, preference data, constraints, classifiers, refusal policies, and escalation rules.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Safety policies, constitutional constraints & alignment is to connect Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families), Multi-objective, constrained & Pareto optimization to downstream capabilities including Conversational assistants & chatbots, Browser, desktop & computer-use agents, Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation.
examples: substrate for Browser, desktop & computer-use agents
substrate for Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families), Multi-objective, constrained & Pareto optimization.
